nasb.text: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight, and shall offer with it the same grain offering and the same drink offering as in the morning, for a soothing aroma, an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight, and shall offer with it a grain offering and its drink offering, as in the morning, for a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 那另一隻羊你要在傍晚的時候獻上，照著早晨的素祭和它的奠祭一樣辦理，作馨香之氣，作獻給耶和華的火祭。

ccb.text: 另一只羊要在黄昏的时候献上，所献的素祭和奠祭要跟早晨的一样，作为蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
